name: Pythagorean Theorem Calculator
desc: Calculate the hypotenuse of a right triangle given the two legs.
description: Calculate hypotenuse or legs of right triangle.
seo_description: Free pythagorean theorem calculator: calculate hipotenusa, area_triangulo from your cateto_a, cateto_b. Instant results, not sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate hypotenuse with sid is 3 and 4.

range_hints.cateto_a: Construction: 0.5-50m; Surveying: 1-1000m; General: any positive value
range_hints.cateto_b: Same as cateto_a; both must be positive non-zero values

result_context: The hipotenusa ({hipotenusa}) is the longest side opposite the right angle; area_triangulo ({area_triangulo}) is half the product of legs; perimeter ({perimeter}) is total boundary length.
formula_display: Hypotenuse = √(Cateto A² + Cateto B²) | Area = (A × B) ÷ 2
mistakes: Adding legs directly instead of squaring first (5.5 + 12.3 ≠ hypotenuse)
Forgetting to take square root after adding the squares
Using this formula for non-right triangl is where it doesn't apply
